text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time, Trainer. Soon will come the signal
for the curtains to rise...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see what spectacle awaits me
beyond those velvet drapes.
choice_data_list: It'll just be the usual track, won't it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but each performance shifts and changes
according to the players who take stage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your rapport with your fellow actors, the ad-libs
that come to mind...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They're unpredictable and part of what makes a
live performance so terrifying and entertaining!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Aah! Be still, my beating heart! Even it knows that
today's race will surely be a good one!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Come now! No two performances are the same.
Let's treat the audience to a once-in-a-lifetime
show!
